_doc: Declarative task-type registry. Add, edit, or remove entries here without touching Python code. The AI uses this list to decide which task type fits the user's request and what fields it still needs to collect. If the AI sees a request that fits NONE of these, it can propose a brand-new task type on the fly - the generic handler will capture it as an inquiry.

task_types.name: book_order
task_types.label: Book an order
task_types.description: User wants to place a new order for a product.

field_prompts.product: What product would you like to order?

examples: Book me a large coffee to 21 Oak Street

task_types.name: raise_complaint
task_types.label: Raise a complaint
task_types.description: User wants to file a complaint about an order, product, or service.

field_prompts.order_id: Could you tell me the order id?
field_prompts.issue: Please describe the issue you're facing.

examples: I want to complain about order 12

task_types.name: give_feedback
task_types.label: Give feedback
task_types.description: User wants to share feedback or rate the service.

field_prompts.rating: On a scale of 1 to 5, how would you rate us?
field_prompts.message: What feedback would you like to share?

task_types.name: check_order_status
task_types.label: Check order status
task_types.description: User wants to know the status of an existing order.

field_prompts.order_id: Which order id would you like to check?

task_types.name: cancel_order
task_types.label: Cancel an order
task_types.description: User wants to cancel an existing order.

field_prompts.order_id: Which order id should I cancel?

examples: I want to cancel my order

task_types.name: track_delivery
task_types.label: Track delivery
task_types.description: User wants live tracking info for a delivery.

field_prompts.order_id: Which order id should I track?

task_types.name: general_inquiry
task_types.label: General question or other request
task_types.description: User is asking a general question, having casual conversation, or making a request that does not fit any other task type. Use this for FAQs, hours, location, refund policy, payment methods, or anything not covered above.

field_prompts.question: What would you like to know?

examples: Tell me about your return policy
